summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HomeDeco AI-powered e-commerce platform. Backend APIs 94.4% functional, frontend UI working well with 6-language support and AI integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Click interception on category elements - overlay blocking interactions

integration_issues.issue: Some UI elements have click interception preventing smooth interaction flow

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and trust badges
Language selector works - all 6 languages available (EN, DE, TR, FR, AR, NL)
Product categories display correctly with images
Admin panel dashboard and filtering working
Backend APIs: categories, materials, shipping, price calculation, AI chat, orders, payments
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin materials API 520 error and resolve UI click interception issues on product category elements to improve user interaction flow
